title: São Bernardo do Campo, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

São Bernardo do Campo is a city in SP with a population of 849,874. The heart of Brazil’s automotive industry in the ABC region, known for its industrial heritage and the Estância Park.
